Function process_color_slice

Source 
pub fn process_color_slice<'a>(
    ctx: &QueryContext<'_>,
    fallback_provider: &'a dyn TypedComponentFallbackProvider<Color>,
    num_instances: usize,
    annotation_infos: &'a ResolvedAnnotationInfos,
    colors: &'a [Color],
) -> Vec<Color32>
Expand description

Process Color components using annotations and default colors.
